title: JAIL INFORMATION - 211info
text: CLACKAMAS COUNTY JAIL JAIL INFORMATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates correctional facilities for adults in custody. Assists families in locating an adult in custody within the corrections system. Provides in-person and video visitation opportunities for adults in custody and visitors. Processes bail and commissary transactions. 2206 Kaen Road Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-11pm (503) 722-6777 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Jail Information (503) 722-6777 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7am-11pm Services: County Correctional Facilities Prisoner Locator Services If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
